default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review CheckThat content performance and plan for GrowthX properties.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CheckThat growth is strong but uneven.** Pricing/Answers/Reviews are driving impression growth, while Brand pages are declining. The strategy is to double down on high-performing, lower-funnel page types.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [**A critical pipeline bug is blocking all new CheckThat content.** The system is generating articles from error messages, producing nonsensical content and halting production.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [**GrowthX & AI-led Growth content will launch this week.** The team will define strategies and create "example good" pages for Alternatives and Listicle formats to guide future pipeline development.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2538.0)
  - [**Engineering priorities are misaligned.** The CheckThat team is blocked by long-standing tickets, while the product team is focused on signup conversion. Jason will escalate to resolve this conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

## Topics

### CheckThat: Performance & Blockers

  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [**Strong Growth:** Pricing, Answers, and Reviews pages are driving significant impression growth.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [**Brand Pages Declining:** Impressions are down for the second week.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
          - [**Hypothesis:** New content is cannibalizing traffic from brand pages.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
          - [**Action:** Test new meta titles and descriptions first. Reformatting for readability is a lower priority.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Blocker: Critical Pipeline Bug:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [**Issue:** The content pipeline is generating articles using error messages as research.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [**Impact:** All new content is nonsensical and unusable, halting production.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [**Status:** An initial fix failed; the engineering team is investigating again.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [**Blocker: Engineering Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [**Problem:** Long-standing, high-priority tickets (e.g., bulk generation, quality fixes) are not being addressed.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Reason:** The engineering team's focus has shifted to signup conversion and product fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [**Conflict:** This contradicts the goal of driving top-of-funnel growth for the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)

### GrowthX & AI-led Growth: New Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Replicate CheckThat's automated content success for GrowthX and AI-led Growth.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
  - [**Property Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Bottom-of-funnel content for potential clients (e.g., "Top SEO agencies for startups").](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
      - [**AI-led Growth:** Broader, educational content for the marketing community (e.g., "How to do keyword research").](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2134.0)
  - [**Initial Page Types:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
      - [**Alternatives:** E.g., "Alternatives to Conductor."](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
      - [**Listicles:** E.g., "Best SEO agencies for FinTech."](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=3193.0)
    1.  [**Define Strategy:** Clarify the content focus for each property.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
    2.  [**Create "Example Good" Pages:** Generate initial drafts using CheckThat's pipeline, then polish with Claude/Cursor to define the quality bar for engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=3490.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Resolve the engineering priority conflict to unblock CheckThat tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Schedule a team session to set up Cursor.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**Saskia:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
      - [Define the content strategy for GrowthX and AI-led Growth.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
      - [Get the Answer page generation process from Carrie.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [**Kavishka:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Investigate the `index.me` data sync issue.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Saskia & Kavishka:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=3193.0)
      - [Create "example good" pages for Alternatives and Listicles to guide pipeline development.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=3193.0)
  - [**Danni:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=3067.0)
      - [Share the existing AI-led Growth content strategy document.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=3067.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
      - [Use the CheckThat channel to flag production blockers, CC'ing Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/MCDTx7zwxtohsXGSec_a5ePhohHKDsRp?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
